title: LabubuCPVP
description: This is a texture pack made by the owner of duolingo cpvp (my name is in the description of that pack) It's a cpvp texture pack with labubu items
body:
Step into Crystal PvP with clean visuals and Labubu style. The **LabubuCPVP** Pack is designed for maximum visibility, smooth gameplay, and aesthetic vibes while keeping every essential optimized for competitive fights.

🔥 Features:

Low Fire – Smaller, less obstructive fire for better vision during fights

Labubu Totem – Custom small Labubu totem that stays out of your way

Crystal PvP Essentials – Optimized end crystals, obsidian, anchors, and combat items

Clean Pop Effects – Smooth, satisfying totem pop visuals

Minimal GUI – Clear inventory and hotbar for easy navigation

FPS Friendly – Lightweight textures for smooth performance

Aesthetic Theme – Cute Labubu style mixed with clean PvP design

⚔️ Perfect for:

Crystal PvP

SMP PvP

Crystal practice servers

Competitive and casual players

Stay clean. Stay fast. Let Labubu carry your totems.
